# meok-rail-freight-uk-mcp

> UK rail freight compliance — ORR licensing, ROGS safety certificate, Railway Interoperability Regulations 2011, TSI LOC&PAS/WAG, RID dangerous goods, ORR 14 Major Issues inspection prep, Network Rail capacity access. By MEOK AI Labs.

MCP server by MEOK AI Labs. Framework: fastmcp. Transport: stdio.

## Tools
- check_orr_licence_compliance
- check_railway_interoperability_directive
- check_tsi_loc_pas_freight
- check_rsl_safety_certificate
- check_dgsa_rail_class7_class1
- prepare_orr_inspection_pack
- check_network_rail_capacity_access

## Install
```
pip install meok-rail-freight-uk-mcp
```

## Links
- PyPI: https://pypi.org/project/meok-rail-freight-uk-mcp/
- Docs: https://meok.ai
